title: Trail mix recalled because of undeclared allergens
content:
Ferris Coffee & Nut Co. of Grand Rapids, MI, is recalling a single lot of Frederik’s by Meijer Vanilla Bourbon Trail Mix because it may contain undeclared wheat and soy. 

People who have an allergy or severe sensitivity to wheat or soy run the risk of serious

title: Bonbons recalled because of undeclared nuts
content:
French Broad Chocolates PBC is recalling Bette’s Bake Sale Bonbon Collection boxes with batch numbers 260414 and 260417 because of the potential to contain undeclared walnuts.

title: Food Safety Summit offers free live-streamed sessions
content:

title: EU audit shows improved Brazilian Salmonella situation for pepper and watermelon
content:
An assessment of black pepper controls in Brazil has revealed the Salmonella contamination rate has improved but raised questions about a lack of checks at primary production level.

The September 2025 DG Sante audit assessed the official control systems for food of non-animal origin intended for export to the European

title: Nestlé job cull begins in Europe under plan to eliminate 16,000 positions
content:
Nestlé has started to roll out job cuts in Europe as part of the 16,000-cull announced by CEO Philipp Navratil in October.

The post Nestlé job cull begins in Europe under plan to eliminate 16,000 positions appeared first on Just Food.

title: UK food inflation could hit 7% – Bank of England survey
content:
UK food inflation could reach 7% this year, businesses have told the Bank of England after the Food & Drink Federation predicted 9-10%.
